scripts.clean: npm run clean:admin && npm run clean:app
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:app
scripts.lint: npm run lint:admin  && npm run lint:app
scripts.watch: conc -n admin,app -c auto "npm run watch:admin" "npm run watch:app"
scripts.clean: npm run clean:admin && npm run clean:app && npm run clean:dashboard && npm run clean:teacher
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:app && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:teacher
scripts.lint: npm run lint:admin  && npm run lint:app && npm run lint:dashboard && npm run lint:teacher
scripts.watch: conc -n admin,app,dashboard,teacher -c auto "npm run watch:admin" "npm run watch:app" "npm run watch:dashboard" "npm run watch:teacher"
